description: Composition Dark blue shirt with white and light blue checks coupled with yellow accents, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, full front buttoned placket with metallic buttons, pockets on either chest with buttoned flaps and stitch detailing, stylish fabric badge above left pocket, looped shoulder flaps and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Preferably hand wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened, using a mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Flat dry or drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Preferably steam iron Checks that add immense style to your casual look is what scullers brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and black suede footwear for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6.2', Shoulders-17.5"
